heading: Statutory construction
label: 522 Statutory construction
text: Nothing in this chapter, any amendment made by this chapter, or in , shall be construed to limit judicial deference to regulations, adjudications, interpretations, orders, decisions, judgments, or any other actions of the Secretary of Homeland Security or the Attorney General.section 1103 of title 8
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Homeland Security Act of 2002, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 107–296116 Stat. 2135Nov. 25, 2002
